title: Amid CEO Controversy, Ford's Stock Holds Strong

title: Ford: No Way Out From The UAW Pain

The UAW strike has already triggered furloughed headcounts and idled production, potentially impacting its near-term deliveries.

title: Ford Motor ‘pauses' construction of Michigan EV battery plant
text: Ford Motor Co announced on Monday that it is “pausing” construction of a $3.5 billion electric vehicle (EV) battery plant in Marshall, Michigan until it is confident it can run the factory competitively.   The auto giant said the move comes as it plans to limit spending for the time being, although according to a Ford spokesperson no final decisions have been made about its investment in a new lithium iron phosphate (LFP) EV battery plant about 100 miles west of Detroit, The Detroit News reported.
